author: ShadyTidus
name: ShadyCogs
short: Collection of utility, moderation, and event management cogs
description: A collection of Red-DiscordBot cogs for moderation, events, server utilities, and more. Features tournament management with Challonge integration, voice moderation, alt tracking, anonymous feedback, game server status, and health monitoring.
install_msg:
Thanks for using ShadyCogs!

Browse available cogs with: `[p]cog list shadycogs`
Install a cog with: `[p]cog install shadycogs <cogname>`

For support, visit: https://github.com/ShadyWorks-Net/shadycogs
